summary: NLYT Proof scoring rebalance testing completed. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend loads correctly with proof sessions and video evidence panels rendering properly.

backend: On-time check-in with 0 heartbeats = 50 pts (medium, not strong)
On-time check-in with 5 min heartbeats on 30 min meeting = 55 pts (strong)
Very late check-in (+25min) with 20 min heartbeats = 35 pts (medium)
On-time check-in with full 30 min session = 80 pts (strong)
score_breakdown includes flow_bonus key (4 keys total)
attendance_service: score >= 55 triggers on_time with review_required=false
attendance_service: score 30-54 triggers manual_review with review_required=true
attendance_service: score < 30 triggers no_show with review_required=true
Session doc template includes flow_bonus in score_breakdown
frontend: Login page loads and works with test credentials

context_for_next_testing_agent: NLYT Proof scoring rebalanced: (1) _compute_score in proof_routes.py now uses 40/30/10/20 weights instead of 30/40/0/30, (2) score_breakdown has 4 keys: checkin_points, duration_points, flow_bonus, video_api_points, (3) strong threshold lowered to 55 (was 60), (4) attendance_service.py uses score >= 55 for strong and checkin_points >= 30 for on_time. All tests pass.
